templates.name: piano-keys
templates.instructions: Click a piano key or press the corresponding letter key (A, B, C, D) to select your answer. Each key plays its musical note when pressed.

controls.description: Click piano key to select answer

templates.name: treasure-chest-key
templates.instructions: Click on the treasure chest that contains the correct answer. Your golden key will fly toward the chest and attempt to unlock it. Choose wisely - the correct chest will open to reveal treasure, while the wrong one will shake and stay locked!

controls.description: Click on a treasure chest to unlock it

templates.name: millionaire-final-question
templates.instructions: Select the correct answer to win one million dollars.

controls.description: Select answer A, B, C, or D

templates.name: wind-chime-melody
templates.instructions: Hold mouse to blow wind, release to chime your answer.

controls.action: Select answer label or hold to create breeze

templates.name: vampire-striker
templates.instructions: Time your strike to pierce the correct answer as it scrolls below the vampire.

controls.description: Click STRIKE button to thrust pitchfork

templates.name: frame-fixer
templates.instructions: Click on the tilted painting with the correct answer to straighten it

controls.description: Click tilted painting to straighten it

templates.name: win95-file-drop
templates.instructions: Drag the correct file into the folder to answer.

controls.description: Click and drag file to drop zone

templates.name: ocean-answer-fisher
templates.instructions: Lower your hook to catch the correct answer!

controls.description: Move horizontally to position fishing hook
Click and hold to lower hook into water

templates.instructions: Click a glowing radio dial to tune into your answer.

templates.name: rocket-launch-commander
templates.instructions: Click the correct button to launch the rocket successfully.

templates.instructions: Click the valve to flow water to the correct answer.

controls.description: Click on valve to open pipe and start water flow

templates.name: slingshot
templates.instructions: Hit the right answer!

controls.description: Click and drag ball to aim slingshot

templates.name: arrow-ufo-hunter
templates.instructions: Shoot the UFO with the correct answer! Click and drag away from the bow to aim and build power, then release to fire your arrow.

controls.description: Click and drag to aim and power your shot, release to fire

templates.name: balance-beam
templates.instructions: Tip the scale to the right answer

controls.description: Click and hold the right/left half of the canvas to tilt the beam toward the right bucket

templates.name: pizza-builder
templates.instructions: Click on the pizza slice with the correct answer topping.

controls.description: Hover over pizza slices to preview
Click on slice to select answer

templates.name: snake-answer-eater
templates.instructions: Use arrow keys to control the snake's direction. Press any arrow key to start moving. Navigate to the correct answer while avoiding walls and your own body.

templates.name: mcq-whackamole
templates.instructions: Whack the mole matching your answer!

templates.name: rose-ceremony-quiz
templates.instructions: Click a contestant to give them the rose and reveal if they have the correct answer.

templates.name: bomb-defusal
templates.instructions: Position the scissors over the correct wire and click to cut it.

controls.description: Move scissors and click to cut wire

templates.name: temple-idol-swap
templates.instructions: Tap a sandbag to swap it with the golden idol!

controls.description: Tap a sandbag to select your answer

templates.name: gazillionaire
templates.instructions: Tap your final answer for the Gazillion dollar prize!

templates.name: golf-striker
templates.instructions: Aim with mouse, hold to charge, release to putt!

templates.name: hungry-monster-feeder
templates.instructions: Feed the hungry monster the correct answer!

controls.description: Tap a food to feed the monster

templates.name: word-search-true-false
templates.instructions: Find and select TRUE or FALSE hidden in the letter grid by dragging across the letters.

controls.description: Drag across letters to select them

templates.name: pokemon-battle-arena
templates.instructions: Click the correct answer button to defeat your opponent in battle.

templates.name: jetpack-quiz
templates.instructions: Fly through an exit to select your answer!

templates.name: alchemists-potion-bottles
templates.instructions: Press 1-4 to grab a glowing potion bottle

templates.instructions: Read the Terms of Service carefully (or don't), then tap True or False to indicate whether you agree with the statement.

controls.description: Scroll through the Terms of Service
Tap True or False to answer

templates.instructions: Watch the ball, then guess which cup hides it!

templates.instructions: Water a flower to full bloom to select your answer.

templates.name: maze-escape
templates.instructions: Tilt your phone to roll the ball to your answer!

templates.instructions: Drag the correct answer's shape into its matching hole

templates.instructions: Drag the wire from the correct answer to the matching colored hole

templates.instructions: Find the word TRUE or FALSE hidden in the letter grid to answer the question.
controls: Drag across letters in the grid to select them
Select letters in a straight line (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal)
Find and select TRUE or FALSE to submit your answer

templates.name: Slingshot True/False
templates.instructions: Drag the ball from the slingshot and release to launch toward the True or False target

templates.name: answer-pump
templates.instructions: Click the triangular button below your chosen answer repeatedly to inflate its pressure meter. Each pump requires about 6 clicks to reach 100%. When fully pumped, your answer is submitted with an explosion effect.

controls.description: Click the triangular button below your answer choice to pump it

templates.instructions: Swipe toward the correct hoop to score!
